mapper.select: select id, project_id, analysis_task_id, risk_type, risk_level, source_type, source_id, title, reason, suggestion, status, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time from project_risk_record where project_id = #{projectId} order by created_time desc, id desc

select id, project_id, analysis_task_id, risk_type, risk_level, source_type, source_id, title, reason, suggestion, status, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time from project_risk_record where analysis_task_id = #{analysisTaskId} order by created_time desc, id desc
